intents.response: Hello! Welcome to our coaching center. How can I help you?
We offer classes for JEE, NEET, CET, and 10th & 12th boards (CBSE/State).
The fees vary per course. For JEE and NEET: ₹50,000/year. For boards: ₹25,000/year.
Our classes run from 8 AM to 7 PM in batches. Please specify your course for timing details.
We are located at ABC Road, XYZ Nagar, near City Library, Pune.
